case_title: IN RE: IN THE MATTER OF 637 POWELL STREET CONDOMNIUM

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-03-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

NOTICE OF CONTINUED HRG RE PETITION TO AUTHORIZE APPROVAL OF AMENDED AND RESTATED DECLARATION; POS (MOVED TO 10/31/13 PER COURT) FILED BY PETITIONER IN THE MATTER OF 637 POWELL STREET CONDOMNIUM OWNERS ASSOCAIATION , A CALIFORNIA UNINCORPORATED ASSOCIATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSED THAT SHE KNOWS MELISSA BAUMAN WARD WHOSE NAME APPEARS ON THE PLEADING. HER HUSBAND AND THE JUDGE'S HUSBAND ARE PARTNERS AT THE SAME LAW FRIM. SHE SEES HER SOCIALLY AT THE LAW FIRM ON RELATED EVENTS ONE OR TWO TIMES A YEAR. SHE DID NOT KNOW UNTIL SHE READ THE PAPERS THAT SHE WAS AN ATTORNEY AT BERDING & WEIL OR THAT THIS WAS HER AREA OF PRACTICE. SHE NEVER TALKED TO HER ABOUT MS. WARD'S PRACTICE OR THIS CASE. THIS WILL NOT AFFECT THE COURT'S ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL. PETITIONER IN THE MATTER OF 637 POWELL STREET CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO AUTHORIZE APPROVAL OF AMENDED AND RESTATED DECLARATION OF COMMON INTEREST DEVELOPMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT ALL OF THE REQUIREMENTS HAVE BEEN MET UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 1356 INCLUDING NOTICE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ( MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302/MJM)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER IN THE MATTER OF 637 POWELL STREET CONDOMNIUM'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO AUTHORIZE APPROVAL OF AMENDED AND RESTATED DECLARATION OF COMMON INTEREST DEVELOPMENT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 31, 2013 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 3, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Granting Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amended And Restated Declaration Of Common Interest Development
Off Calendar Oct-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. STEVEN S. WEILL OF BERDING & WEILL LLP, TEL. NO. (925) 838-2090 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - Judge Miller disclosed that she knows Melissa Bauman Ward whose name appears on the pleading. Her husband and the judge's husband are partners at the same law frim. She sees her socially at the law firm on related events one or two times a year. She did not know until she read the papers that she was an attorney at Berding & Weil or that this was her area of practice. She never talked to her about Ms. Ward's pratice or this case. This will not affect the court's ability to be fair and impartial. THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PETITIONER IN THE MATTER OF 637 POWELL STREET CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Motion For Order Granting Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amended And Restated Declaration Of Common Interest Development is granted. The court finds that all of the requirements have been met under Civil Code Section 1356 including notice. No opposition filed. ( Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Granting Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amended And Restated Declaration Of Common Interest Development
Off Calendar Oct-03-2013 Continued To Oct-31-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER IN THE MATTER OF 637 POWELL STREET CONDOMNIUM's Motion For Order Granting Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amended And Restated Declaration Of Common Interest Development
is continued to October 31, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 3, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
